Title:
Diversity and inclusion practices, commonly known as DEI, are a set of values and practices that ensure everyone within a company is treated fairly with equal opportunities. 

Upholding a DEI policy not only has a positive effect on employees, but clients and consumers, too. With a new, younger crowd over taking the buyer market, many of them choose to work for or buy from companies that align with their values. 🤝🌟 

At Impact, we celebrate not only our employees, but clients and community as well. We foster an environment where employees can come together to bring ideas to life. ✨ 

Head to https://hubs.ly/Q034YsqP0 to see benefits to creating an inclusive office. 

#DEI #Diversity #Inclusion #EmployeeEngagement

Starting this year, #CMMC 2.0 will be required for businesses working with the Department of Defense. Not complying could cost your business up to $1M per violation – definitely not how you want to kick off 2025. 😬 The updated Cybersecurity Maturity
Description:
Starting this year, #CMMC 2.0 will be required for businesses working with the Department of Defense. Not complying could cost your business up to $1M per violation – definitely not how you want to kick off 2025. 😬 

The updated Cybersecurity Maturity Model Certification (CMMC 2.0) makes compliance simpler by reducing levels from five to three and offering smaller businesses the option to self-assess. It’s easier, more accessible, and still ensures strong protection for sensitive defense data. 🛡️✨ 

Whether you work with the DoD or just want to strengthen your security practices, CMMC compliance is your shield against cyber threats and costly risks. 

Head to https://hubs.ly/Q033-_Q00 to learn more about CMMC compliance. 

#CMMC #Cybersecurity #CyberTips

Can one team really do it all? The short answer: no.  

🔧 IT keeps your business running smoothly. 
🛡️ Cybersecurity protects it from ever-evolving threats. 

When these roles are treated as one, vulnerabilities grow, responses slow, and risks increase.  Separating IT and cybersecurity creates focus, accountability, and stronger results. 

What’s your take? Let us know below! ⬇️ 

While you’re at it, check out our webinar that breaks down the differences more in-depth 👉 https://hubs.ly/Q0332RWN0
